name: Sesame Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the egg yolk, lemon juice, and soy sauce together.
2. Gradually add the vegetable oil to the mixture, whisking vigorously.
3. Continue adding the oil drop by drop until a thick, emulsified mixture is achieved.
4. Once emulsified, you may begin adding the sesame oil more quickly, spoonful by spoonful.
5. Keep whisking until all the oils are fully incorporated.
Makes 1 Cup
